# ciscosecureaccess_content_category_list (Data Source)

Data source for retrieving Cisco Secure Access content category lists. Use the returned IDs with the `content_category_list_ids` attribute on the `ciscosecureaccess_access_policy` resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up content category lists by partial name match
data "ciscosecureaccess_content_category_list" "restrictive" {
  filter = "Restrictive"
}

output "restrictive_content_category_ids" {
  value = [for c in data.ciscosecureaccess_content_category_list.restrictive.content_category_lists : c.id]
}

# Attach a content category list to an access policy
resource "ciscosecureaccess_access_policy" "internal_block" {
  name         = "internal_block"
  action       = "block"
  enabled      = true
  priority     = 4
  log_level    = "LOG_ALL"
  traffic_type = "PUBLIC_INTERNET"
  source_types = ["networks"]
  source_ids   = []
  content_category_list_ids = [
    for c in data.ciscosecureaccess_content_category_list.restrictive.content_category_lists : c.id
  ]
  description = "Block restrictive content categories"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (String) Optional case-insensitive substring used to filter content category lists by name. If omitted, all content category lists are returned.

### Read-Only

- `content_category_lists` (Attributes List) List of Cisco Secure Access content category lists matching the filter (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--content_category_lists))

<a id="nestedatt--content_category_lists"></a>
### Nested Schema for `content_category_lists`

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number) Unique ID of content category list
- `name` (String) Name of content category list
- `type` (String) Type of content category setting
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this is the organization default content category setting
